justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially misinterpreted "after-tomorrow at 10h" as June 3rd, but correctly adjusted to June 4th in subsequent turns.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering alternative slots.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made several check_availability calls for times that were not available, leading to multiple turns of unavailability messages.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation felt a bit tiring due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times, requiring the user to drive the search.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered by checking new times provided by the user, but did not proactively offer alternatives or expand the search intelligently on its own.
